text:

    multimedia/{mplayer|mencoder} Add missing CFLAGS for ffmpeg4 headers

    Details:
    This was missed in the previous commit. Ensure the ffmpeg4 headers are
    included, not the ffmpeg 6 ones.

    PR:             270569
    Reported by:    diizzy
    Tested by:      george@m5p.com, riggs
